_note: Manually curated starter leads scraped during setup via Claude WebSearch+WebFetch. Used by 03_seed_initial_leads.py if Firecrawl key is missing. Real emails only — gated/form-only entries are placeholders for Firecrawl pass to complete.

leads.about_snippet: FYS is a yacht brokerage and charter company based in Palma de Mallorca, specializing in yacht sales, charter, and management in the Balearics.
leads.address: C/ de la Victoria 4, 1 E-07001 Palma de Mallorca

leads.about_snippet: Boat Charter Mallorca offers boat and yacht charter services in Mallorca with a focus on the Palma area.

The Crew Network expanded into Palma de Mallorca as the buzzing hub for yachts in the Mediterranean. Specialize in matching qualified, vetted crew across all experience levels with yacht positions during refit and charter seasons throughout the Balearics.
leads.address: c/o Fraser Spain, C/ Porto Pi, 4A, Palma de Mallorca
leads.note: Form-only contact — use contact form or LinkedIn DM Montse

leads.about_snippet: Bluewater began as a crew agency in 1991 and has grown into one of the largest and most successful yacht crew recruitment agencies in the world. Main offices in Antibes and Palma.
International yacht crew agency based in Mallorca offering exclusive one-on-one service. Job listings reference Palma as a base location.
Burgess is a leading superyacht broker offering yacht sales, charter, and management. Palma office serves the Balearic region.
leads.address: Calle Porto Pi 8, Edificio Reina Constanza, Palma de Mallorca
leads.note: Standard pattern palma@; verify before sending

leads.about_snippet: Fraser Yachts: yacht brokerage, charter, management, crew, and new construction. Palma office at C/ Porto Pi, 4A.

leads.about_snippet: Bareboat, skippered, and luxury crewed yacht charter operator with a base in Palma de Mallorca. Catamarans and monohulls.

leads.about_snippet: Established and accredited RYA training centre in Palma de Mallorca providing RYA courses for leisure and professional seafarers. Training from EUR 375/day with optional RYA qualified training skipper.
Yacht charter operator with base at Real Club Nautico, Palma de Mallorca. Pattern email guess based on parent domain pitter.com.
